startingCommit: e25c6db1a69f008dc13ab07eceb7689979d27eaa Add connected file detail UI
goal: Add read-only config selection state and a manual config picker scaffold without activating file picking, persistence, profile switching, layered writes, or write-target changes.

behavior: Represents manual candidate selected for preview only.
Represents review-all, only-this-file, and cancel source-follow choices.
Represents cancelled and confirmed-for-future-review lifecycle states.
write_target_path returns only the auto-detected config and does not promote manual preview paths.

manualPickerScaffold.behavior: The Config page shows Choose Config File... (planned) as a disabled placeholder. No GTK file picker is opened in this sprint.

sourceFollowScaffold.uiCopy: Review connected files: Review all connected files / Only this file / Cancel.

uiChanges: Config file section now says auto-detection is a starting point.
Config file section says users will be able to choose another config file to review.
Config file section explicitly says this has not changed what the app will write.
Config file section says manual selection is preview-only and not saved yet.
Choose Config File button remains disabled and is labeled planned.
testsAdded: Updated tests/dashboard_config_page_scaffold.rs for the planned Config picker label.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with current sprint changes plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts intentionally left uncommitted

proofStillMissing: Real GTK/libadwaita file picker is not implemented.
Manual config selection is not persisted.
Manual config selection does not reload app data.
Manual config selection does not affect write targets.
Profile switching and layered writes are not implemented.
nextRecommendedSprint: Implement a harmless read-only file picker preview flow only after deciding how selected config previews should be displayed and cancelled without affecting writes.
